title: lycopodium obscurum var. genuinum
intro: Lycopodium obscurum var. genuinum, also known as the club moss, is a species of evergreen plant that belongs to the club moss family (Lycopodiaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high content of lignin and sesquiterpenes. The health benefits of Lycopodium obscurum var. genuinum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and boost the immune system. Lycopodium obscurum var. genuinum is typically used in herbal preparations such as tinctures, infusions, and salves, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
